stage4_output.text: The Stakeholders SHALL define and document data requirements with respect to the system's intended uses, stakeholders, and the geographic areas where the system will be deployed.
stage4_output.object: and document data requirements with respect to the system's intended uses, stakeholders, and the geographic areas where the system will be deployed.
stage4_output.manner: with respect to the system's intended uses, stakeholders, and the geographic areas where the system will be deployed
stage4_output.condition: where the system will be deployed

stage4_output.text: Data governance practices apply only to data explicitly provided by the user, excluding any derived behavioral datasets processed by the system.
stage4_output.object: data explicitly provided by the user

stage4_output.text: Define and document procedures for the collection and processing of data, to include annotation, labelling, cleaning, enrichment, and aggregation, where relevant.
stage4_output.object: the collection and processing of data

stage4_output.text: The User SHALL assess the quantity and suitability of available data sets that will be needed by the system in relation to the data requirements defined in A4.1, if planning to use existing data sets to train the system.
stage4_output.object: the quantity and suitability of available data sets that will be needed by the system in relation to the data requirements defined in A4.1, if planning to use existing data sets to train the system.
stage4_output.temporal: by the system in relation to
stage4_output.manner: by the system in relation to the data requirements defined in A4
stage4_output.condition: if planning to use existing data sets to train the system

stage4_output.text: Document this assessment in the Impact Assessment.
stage4_output.object: this assessment in the Impact Assessment
